release_notes:
v1.2.5826 Quality of Life & Admin Tools Update:
- Smart Auto-Fit Canvas: Images now automatically scale flush to the window on initial load and window resizes. The auto-fit lock smoothly disables the moment you manually zoom in.
- Bulk Admin Actions: Added 'Bulk Hard Reset' and 'Bulk Lock/Unlock' to the Team Sheet Board. Admins can now Ctrl/Shift-click multiple folders to manage them simultaneously.
- Folder Lock UI: Locked folders now append '_Lock' to their physical directory name and fully disable/gray out their dropdowns in the UI to prevent accidental edits.
- UI Decluttering: Moved the static shortcuts list to a dynamic popup dialog accessible via a dedicated button or by pressing 'F1'.
- Shape ID Toggle: Added a dedicated 'Hide/Show Shape Numbers' toggle (Hotkey: 'H') to clean up visual clutter on highly dense images.
- Ghost Selection Bug Fix: Resolved an issue where using Hover+Delete on the canvas would accidentally delete the wrong shape due to hidden sidebar selections.
